purpose: Record the opt-in padded owner-rank VJP replacement for the TorchTitan MORI+AITER routed backward local PyTorch autograd VJP.

source_changes.default_behavior: Default local VJP mode remains autograd unless TORCHTITAN_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded is set.

gbs4_noaux.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_GBS=4 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_DSA_INDEXER_LOSS_COEFF=0 CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

gbs64_liaux.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

read: The padded owner-rank VJP mode replaces the local autograd VJP inside the MORI-routed backward path and passes 4xMI350 short-sequence direct TorchTitan training with finite loss/grad norm, gradient accumulation, default LI aux on the GBS64 run, no checkpoint directory, and clean process-group teardown. This is an integration gate, not final long-sequence performance evidence.
